title: Peggy Mccurley
compiled_truth: Peggy Mccurley is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-07 to 2001-11-28), Peggy Mccurley sent 14 and received 203 emails, totalling 217 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (12), [Greg Piper](people/greg-piper) (8), [Jeff Bartlett](people/jeff-bartlett) (8), [Suresh Raghavan](people/suresh-raghavan) (8), [Rex Shelby](people/rex-shelby) (8).
